parsed_review.summary: CP00-039 RP00.P02.M07.S11 Lock acquisition rule is correct, consistent, and closeout-ready. precheckControlPlaneTestAndGoldenCaseSetLockAcquisitionRule consumes only the S10 idempotency result (validates S10 marker, test_and_golden_case_set entrypoint, present idempotency_receipt/audit_event_ref, carried allow_metadata_only via full S10 assert) and emits a frozen 67-field result plus a frozen 20-field metadata-only lock-rule receipt (effect allow_metadata_only, synthetic_metadata_no_runtime_lock_acquisition rule, no_lock_owner_persistence). All runtime side effects are denied: lock_acquisition/lock_record_write/lock_store_write/ui_created/test_execution/golden_fixture_generation/golden_fixture_persistence/audit_ledger_append/audit_event_write/runtime_permission/authz/permission_engine/security_trimming/service_logic/runtime_route/db/storage/product_state/idempotency_record/idempotency_store all false. 44 forbidden lock claims (incl acquire_lock, acquire_runtime_lock, lock_resource, lock_matter, persist_lock_record, write_lock_store, create_ui, render_ui) and 25 fail-closed reasons reject forbidden, unknown-truthy, and falsy-non-false claims; matter_id stays null; no_real_data true and synthetic-only ids/keys. Policy, prechecker, validator (assertPolicy/assertResult), fixture precheck_result, contract definition/scope_policy/closeout_state_policy (CP00-039, docs/closeout-packs/cp00-039), README bullet, production_ready_requires flag, and validate-rp00 script (weighted boundary terminal=false->S12, required-closed list extended through S10, live precheck/fixture/reject cases, construction-inspection gate) are mutually consistent. RP00.P02.M07 remains open (source_micro_phase_completed false) with handoff to RP00.P02.M07.S12. Tests cover policy binding, receipt emission, 31 drift rejections, fail-closed claim/source matrix, no-write prechecker, and fixture mirroring. No blocking or minor defects found.
